arts.ttl: Serie A | Lecce v Genoa: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the new year unfolds, Lecce and Genoa find themselves in a critical showdown in Serie A, separated by just three points in the standings. Both teams will be eager to secure a vital victory when they meet at Stadio Via del Mare on Sunday as they aim to distance themselves from the relegation zone. The post Serie A | Lecce v Genoa: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Former AZ winger Jesper Karlsson loaned to Lecce from Bologna to restart Italian adventure
arts.sum: Former AZ Alkmaar stalwart Jesper Karlsson (26) has signed for Lecce on loan from Bologna for the rest of the season (VI).

arts.ttl: Surprise move: Lecce sign Jesper Karlsson from Bologna
arts.sum: As the transfer window opens, Lecce have made an early statement by securing the signing of Jesper Karlsson from Bologna. The Salento-based club are actively seeking reinforcements to aid their fight for survival in Serie A, and Karlsson has been identified as a key addition to strengthen their attacking options. The post Surprise move: Lecce sign Jesper Karlsson from Bologna appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Official: Lecce sign Karlsson on loan from Bologna
arts.sum: Relegation-threatened Lecce have completed a loan deal with Bologna for Jesper Karlsson, who will stay...

arts.ttl: “I prefer the team over the individual,” says Vieira ahead of Lecce clash
arts.sum: In his first press conference of 2025, Patrick Vieira, the head coach of Genoa, addressed the media to discuss the upcoming match against Lecce, which marks their second consecutive away game. arts.ttl: Genoa’s transfer activity: Ankeye to Rapid Bucharest, Pereiro attracts Interest
arts.sum: Genoa are actively working to streamline their squad as the January transfer window unfolds. The Ligurian club is on the verge of finalizing a deal that will see David Ankeye move to Rapid Bucharest.
